archetype_reasoning: This trader exhibits textbook yield-harvesting behaviour: virtually every trade is a NO position entered at prices between 0.94 and 0.998, collecting tiny premiums on near-certain outcomes. Directionality of 1.0 confirms they exclusively take one side. Open positions are a spread of long-shot 2028 presidential candidate NO bets (Zohran Mamdani, LeBron James, MrBeast, Kim Kardashian, etc.) all entered above 0.978, which are not genuine forecasts but premium-collection on obvious non-starters.
domain_blindspots: Trump_US: near-certainty entries mean wins are trivial and losses reveal tail risk, not genuine forecasting edge
All domains: 0.5 win rate at near-certainty prices is actually underperformance vs baseline
domain_summary: This trader has no demonstrable genuine forecasting edge — a 52.4% win rate on Trump_US markets entered above 0.94 represents structural underperformance. The near-certainty entry prices mean any single wrong call (like the Kristi Noem cluster losses) erases many prior wins.
signal_weight_reasoning: All entries are at near-certainty prices (0.94–0.998), making this trader's directional choices informationally worthless for STR-003 signal generation. The trader is not forecasting probability — they are harvesting basis points. Their 50/50 win rate at these prices is worse than random given the implied odds.
behavioural_flags: Exclusively trades NO at prices above 0.94 — never takes contested positions
Multiple entries in the same market at incrementally different prices (Kristi Noem: 6 trades at 0.992–0.995)
Ladder-buying pattern: enters same market 2-3 times at fractionally different prices suggesting automated or systematic accumulation
Open positions span celebrity/long-shot 2028 candidates exclusively, consistent with spray-and-harvest strategy
Some losses on near-certainty positions (Kristi Noem NO at 0.992-0.994 lost 3/6) suggest market mis-resolution or edge cases
risk_patterns: Concentration in near-certainty NO positions creates asymmetric tail risk: each win earns 0.5-2 cents per dollar, each loss costs 99+ cents
27 resolved trades with near-zero net PnL (-$6.63) confirms yield strategy is barely breaking even after losses
Kristi Noem cluster: 3 losses at 0.992-0.994 on what should have been a trivial NO suggests either market anomaly or unexpected resolution criteria — not investigated or adjusted
No evidence of position sizing discipline; shares relatively uniform across all open positions (~68-149 shares)

notable_calls.market: Will Kristi Noem win the 2028 Republican nomination?
notable_calls.significance: Three separate NO positions at 0.992-0.994 lost — either a resolution anomaly or a cautionary example of tail risk in near-certainty harvesting

notable_calls.market: Democrats and Republicans both lose the 2024 Presidential Election?
notable_calls.significance: Near-certain NO at 0.997 lost — highlights that even at extreme probabilities, the strategy carries non-zero loss risk
Entry at 0.941 is the closest to a contested price in the dataset, and it lost — no genuine price discovery value

open_positions_summary: Current open positions are a diversified basket of 2028 presidential long-shot NO bets (LeBron James, MrBeast, Kim Kardashian, Chelsea Clinton, etc.) all above 0.978. The thesis is pure premium harvesting on celebrity/fringe candidates almost certain not to win nominations. This is structurally sound but generates minimal returns and carries correlated tail risk if any position resolves unexpectedly.
watch_items: Monitor resolution of 2028 nomination markets — any surprise resolutions will reveal tail risk in the strategy
Track whether trader begins entering positions below 0.90; if so, reclassify as potential genuine forecaster
Watch for pattern of systematic losses on markets that resolve due to technicalities or rule changes
Check if Marjorie Taylor Greene, Kim Kardashian, Hunter Biden, Rahm Emanuel NO positions resolve as expected by Nov 2028
summary: This trader is a pure yield harvester with zero genuine forecasting signal value. Every trade is a NO position entered at 0.94+ price, collecting fractional premiums on near-certain outcomes across 2028 presidential long-shot markets. A realized PnL of -$6.63 across 27 trades confirms the strategy is barely profitable and heavily exposed to tail risk. Exclude entirely from STR-003 signal generation — this trader reveals nothing about underlying market probabilities.
